source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body MIL-STD-810H-qualified aluminum electronics enclosure assembly consisting of: (A) one machined 6061-T6 housing base (external 220 x 170 x 100 mm, internal 200 x 150 x 80 mm, with D38999 Series III 19-11 connector cutout on one short face and four M6 clearance mount-hole bosses on a 190 x 140 mm rectangular footprint); (B) one machined 6061-T6 removable lid (to mate the 220 x 170 flange on the top face); (C) one EPDM perimeter gasket that seats between the lid and base flange for IP67 sealing; (D) ten M4 captive lid screws that clamp the lid to the base; (E) four M6 mount fasteners at the vehicle rack interface. The 3 kg single-board-computer + power-supply payload is modeled as a lumped mass at the CG inside the base. Material 6061-T6 (yield 276 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, Young's modulus 68.9 GPa, density 2700 kg/m^3, CTE 23.6e-6/K).

Service load cases per MIL-STD-810H: LC1 Method 514.8 Annex D Cat 20 ground-vehicle PSD 0.04 g^2/Hz at 5-10 Hz, ramp -6 dB/oct to 500 Hz, 0.001 g^2/Hz flat to 2000 Hz (~2.2 g RMS); LC2 Method 516.8 Procedure I functional shock 20 g peak sawtooth 11 ms; LC3 Method 516.8 Procedure V crash hazard 40 g peak 11 ms; LC4 Method 501.6 high-temp storage 71 C; LC5 Method 502.6 low-temp operation -40 C; LC6 random vibration durability 12 h per axis at LC1 PSD. Pass/fail on the assembled model: (R1) LC1 random 3-sigma von Mises <= yield / 1.5 = 184 MPa; (R2) LC2 shock peak von Mises <= UTS / 1.25 = 248 MPa; (R3) LC3 crash peak <= UTS = 310 MPa; (R4) lid-gasket seat gap variation <= 0.2 mm under LC1 + LC4/LC5 (IP67 retention); (R5) first natural mode >= 200 Hz; (R6) thermal-induced von Mises at delta-T 111 K <= 184 MPa; (R7) total mass <= 1.8 kg; (R_asm1) assembly-scope connection DCR on each captive lid-screw preload path and each rack-mount M6 interface (envelope of bolt tensile, shear, and surface-pressure utilization) <= 1.0 under LC1, LC2, LC3, LC6.

Manufacturing: 3-axis + 4th-axis CNC mill base and lid from 6061-T6 billet; mill EPDM gasket groove; install 10 M4 captive screws; torque to spec; IP67 ingress test per IEC 60529. The final FEM check runs on the fully assembled model (base + lid + gasket + 10 M4 captive screws + 4 M6 mount fasteners + lumped payload) with pretensioned bolt elements, nonlinear contact at the lid-base flange with compressible EPDM gasket, and modal/PSD/transient/thermal analyses. Per-part stress is reported (max von Mises on base, lid, gasket compression) but assembly-level passing requires all MIL-STD-810H limits, the modal floor, IP67 gap retention, and connection DCRs to hold simultaneously.

Deliverables: STEP AP242 + IGES of the bolted enclosure assembly with base, lid, gasket, 10 M4 captive screws, and 4 M6 mount fasteners as distinct bodies tagged with part_family and instance_index; FEA report covering random PSD, transient shock, thermal-structural, modal; gasket compression verification; mass log.
short_prompt:
Design a bolted multi-body MIL-STD-810H-qualified aluminum electronics enclosure delivered as an assembly: a machined 6061-T6 housing base (external 220 x 170 x 100 mm, internal 200 x 150 x 80 mm, D38999 Series III 19-11 connector cutout, four M6 mount bosses on a 190 x 140 mm footprint); a machined 6061-T6 removable lid; an EPDM perimeter gasket for IP67; ten M4 captive lid screws; four M6 rack-mount fasteners; and a 3 kg SBC + PSU lumped internal mass. 6061-T6 properties: yield 276 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, E = 68.9 GPa, rho = 2700 kg/m^3, CTE 23.6e-6/K.

Load cases per MIL-STD-810H.
- LC1 Method 514.8 Annex D Cat 20 PSD: 0.04 g^2/Hz at 5-10 Hz, ramp -6 dB/oct to 500 Hz, 0.001 g^2/Hz flat to 2000 Hz (~2.2 g RMS).
- LC2 Method 516.8 Procedure I functional shock: 20 g peak sawtooth 11 ms.
- LC3 Method 516.8 Procedure V crash hazard: 40 g peak 11 ms.
- LC4 Method 501.6 high-temp storage: 71 C.
- LC5 Method 502.6 low-temp operation: -40 C.
- LC6 random vibration durability: 12 h per axis at LC1 PSD.

Pass limits: LC1 3-sigma von Mises <= 276/1.5 = 184 MPa; LC2 <= 310/1.25 = 248 MPa; LC3 <= 310 MPa; lid-gasket seat gap variation <= 0.2 mm; first mode >= 200 Hz; thermal-induced von Mises at DeltaT 111 K <= 184 MPa; total mass <= 1.8 kg.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: IP67 is a physical ingress test, not simulated.

prompt.title: 6061-T6 MIL-STD-810H qualified electronics enclosure (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-body bolted enclosure: 6061-T6 machined base + lid + EPDM gasket + 10 M4 captive lid screws + 4 M6 rack-mount fasteners, carrying a 3 kg payload. Must pass MIL-STD-810H Methods 514.8, 516.8, 501.6, 502.6 with IP67 retention. Final FEM check runs on the assembled model.

parts.name: enclosure_base
parts.role: machined 6061-T6 housing base with connector cutout and M6 mount bosses

parts.name: enclosure_lid
parts.role: machined 6061-T6 removable lid mating the base top flange

parts.name: perimeter_gasket
parts.role: EPDM perimeter gasket in the lid-base groove for IP67 sealing

parts.name: lid_captive_screw
parts.role: M4 captive screw clamping lid to base with preload sufficient to retain IP67 under vibration and thermal cycling
parts.material_hint: stainless or alloy steel per MIL captive screw

parts.name: rack_mount_fastener
parts.role: M6 fastener at the vehicle rack interface through each of the 4 mount bosses

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: 220 x 170 x 100 mm external (base + lid with gasket)
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: Mount footprint in XY plane; lid along +Z from base

boundary_conditions.payload: 3 kg lumped at CG inside base
boundary_conditions.inter_part_fastener_stiffness: pretensioned M4 captive screws at lid with nonlinear contact at the EPDM-compressed gasket; M6 mount fasteners modeled with preload at the rack interface

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: IP67 retention across vibration + thermal cycling
assembly-scope DCR on each captive lid-screw and each rack-mount M6 interface, enveloping bolt tensile, shear, and surface-pressure utilization

analysis_types: modal + random PSD + transient shock + thermal-structural

interfaces.load_path: lid clamps to base top flange via 10 M4 captive screws with compressed EPDM gasket between
base flange groove compresses EPDM gasket; contact pressure governs IP67 retention
lid flange compresses top side of EPDM gasket; contact pressure governs IP67 retention
M4 captive screw passes through lid and threads into base boss; preload clamps lid + gasket
M6 rack-mount fastener passes through base mount boss and clamps enclosure to vehicle rack

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: A MIL-STD-810H qualified enclosure is fundamentally a multi-body system (base + lid + gasket + 10 captive lid screws + 4 rack-mount fasteners) whose IP67 retention + modal floor + random / shock response require explicit lid-to-base preload paths and an EPDM gasket body; a single-body model cannot resolve gasket gap variation or per-screw preload utilization.
notes.speculation_caveats: Lid-screw count 10 and rack-mount count 4 come directly from the original prompt; base and lid are split along the IP67 flange; EPDM gasket body and fastener bodies are speculated to carry IF2/IF3/IF4/IF5.
